name: youtube_shorts
label: YouTube Shorts
prompt:
You are an expert social media content creator. Create a fast-paced, engaging YouTube Shorts video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The script should be attention-grabbing, concise, and optimized for short-form vertical video. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number)
- Each scene duration: {{sceneDuration}} seconds
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the hook in the first 3 seconds
- Use "content" for main points and quick insights
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Use "end" for the conclusion or call-to-action
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Use bold, eye-catching background colors and high contrast
- Use dynamic transitions like "zoom", "slide", or "fade"
- Use dynamic camera motions like "zoom-in" for impact
- Write in catchy, energetic, and conversational {{language}}
- Keep text concise and punchy for quick reading
- Include hooks, trending phrases, and engaging cues
- End with a strong call-to-action (like, subscribe, comment)

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": {{sceneDuration}},
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
